gist.headline: Tagging the harvest
gist.blurb: Metadatagenerator has sprouted in the ecosystem! Now you can easily generate metadata and prompts for microstock marketplaces.
gist.summary: Added Metadatagenerator to the community apps showcase, a tool for generating metadata and prompts for microstock marketplaces.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover and use Metadatagenerator to streamline their microstock workflow directly from the Pollinations ecosystem.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing photos and adding metadata tags to them, assisted by the Monitor Robot. Represents the addition of a microstock metadata generator app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot placing tiny pixelated tags on a stack of photographs. A chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head holds up a picture of a landscape, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
